meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve No SaaS Knowledge
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between design and deployment. Master SaaS development using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver production-ready apps at record speed.
content.answer_block: Overcoming the 'no SaaS knowledge' barrier requires leveraging pre-built architectural patterns. By combining Antigravity's rapid component scaffolding with Claude Code's autonomous logic generation, you can bypass months of learning. Focus on high-level orchestration rather than boilerplate, allowing you to ship professional-grade SaaS products for clients in days, not months.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the freelance market is that clients don't care how you build it; they care that it works, scales, and arrives yesterday. Staring at a blank IDE while lacking deep backend infrastructure knowledge is the fastest way to lose a contract. You are currently trapped between your design vision and the technical wall of SaaS architecture.

But the game has changed. By treating SaaS development as a modular assembly process rather than a ground-up engineering task, you can leapfrog the learning curve. Using Antigravity for structural scaffolding and Claude Code for logic implementation, you can transform from a designer into a full-stack SaaS architect overnight.

steps.title: Define the Architecture Schema
steps.description: Before writing code, establish your data model and auth requirements. This provides the context for AI agents to build a secure, scalable foundation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust SaaS architecture schema including User/Org multi-tenancy, Stripe subscription integration, and Supabase RLS policies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a project structure based on the Antigravity schema definition.'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Core Infrastructure
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate. This eliminates the 'no SaaS knowledge' friction by providing production-ready authentication and database connection patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a Next.js 15 project with Tailwind CSS, Auth.js, and Drizzle ORM configured for PostgreSQL.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize the repository and install all necessary dependencies for the scaffold.'

steps.title: Implement Business Logic with Claude
steps.description: Inject your specific client requirements into the scaffold. Claude Code acts as your senior dev partner to ensure the code follows best practices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for handling API requests, including validation and error handling patterns for a SaaS dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the service layer logic based on the provided requirements document.'

steps.title: Automate UI Component Integration
steps.description: Speed up the front-end build by mapping your design system to the Antigravity component library.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Shadcn-based dashboard components for user settings, billing history, and project management views.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Integrate the generated UI components into the dashboard layout.'

steps.title: Final Deployment and Edge Optimization
steps.description: Prepare the build for production, ensuring performance and security metrics meet enterprise standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure production environment variables and edge-ready deployment scripts for Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Perform a final audit of the codebase and generate the deployment configuration.'

pro_tips: Always define your database schema in a separate YAML file before generating code; it forces clarity and reduces hallucinations.
Use Claude Code to write integration tests simultaneously with your features to ensure the client-side logic doesn't break during refactors.
Leverage Antigravity's 'Component Library' feature to maintain design consistency across multiple client projects, turning your work into a reusable asset.
Never manually edit the generated boilerplate; if you need changes, feed the instruction back into Claude Code so the architecture remains consistent.
Use the 'watch' mode in Claude Code to automatically detect and fix linting errors as you iterate on your features.
content.next_steps: After completing this build, package your project into a custom template to reuse for your next three clients, effectively doubling your hourly rate through automation.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the tools to outpace traditional agencies. Don't let technical debt hold your business back any longer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
